prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D selected/highlighted tile sprite for a mobile word puzzle game. Perfect square format. Same rounded rectangle tile shape as a blank tile, but designed for a selected/highlighted state. Neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled and white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Features a stronger elegant drop shadow underneath and a subtle soft outer glow or thin outer outline around the tile. No text, no letters, no numbers. Centered composition, flat vector style, minimal design with very soft, subtle grayscaled gradients. Transparent background.
